positive: A cute, kawaii-style vector illustration of a sleepy fox curled up in a pile of colorful autumn leaves. The artwork must be flat design, utilizing thick outlines and a limited, cheerful autumn color palette (burnt orange, mustard yellow, deep red). Minimalist and charming.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, complex shading
